Alpha Upload Tool

Upload packing lists, add notes, review, and generate your upload file.

PK Number goes in both "PK Number" fields (e.g. PK-35) — not the supplier PO (e.g. PO007798)  ·  Spares: add "tag suffix: - SP" in Notes

One-time setup — upload your Alpha template

The template is saved in your browser. You only need to do this once.

Drop Alpha template (.xlsx) here or click to browse

Downloads the Alpha Supplier sheet — for internal records and packing list reference.
Downloads _ongoing.xlsx — formatted for direct import via Registers → Import → Purchase order.
MWR Outbound Orders — Material Withdrawal Request

Create an Ongoing WMS outbound order from a Material Withdrawal Request. Order number auto-formats as MWR-XXX DD-MM-YYYY.

Drop packing list to auto-fill lines, or click to browse

PDF or Excel · tag, description, qty and pallet ref are extracted

Order Lines
Tag / Article # Description Qty Case / Pallet Ref
Downloads MWR-XXX_DDMMYYYY_order_import.xlsx — import via Order → Import → Choose File in Ongoing WMS.
